item.title: Homemade Choco Tacos Recipe
item.description: These Homemade Choco Tacos consists of a waffle cone “taco shell” stuffed with vanilla ice cream, dipped in milk chocolate and topped with peanuts. I make it a bit different with a fudge-swirled ice cream and lots of different toppings!

media:content.media:title: Homemade Choco Tacos Recipe
media:content.media:description: These Homemade Choco Tacos consists of a waffle cone “taco shell” stuffed with vanilla ice cream, dipped in milk chocolate and topped with peanuts. I make it a bit different with a fudge-swirled ice cream and lots of different toppings!

item.description: A simple BLT sandwich recipe with a crunchy, delicious finish.

item.title: Strawberry and Cream Cookies: The perfect spring treat
item.description: These Strawberry and Cream Cookies have such a strong strawberry flavor with a sweet hint from white chocolate. Chewy, soft, delicious and easy to make!

media:content.media:title: Strawberry and Cream Cookies: The perfect spring treat
media:content.media:description: These Strawberry and Cream Cookies have such a strong strawberry flavor with a sweet hint from white chocolate. Chewy, soft, delicious and easy to make!

item.description: A sweet persimmon pudding with sticky toffee flavor, perfect for dessert inspiration.

item.description: Here's how to make the most delicious burrata pesto and roasted veggie sandwich

item.title: Shaved Brussels Sprout Salad Recipe
item.description: This shaved brussels sprout salad is crisp and delicious. It’s topped with fresh pomegranate seeds, candied pecans, crunchy apples and salty Pecorino Romano. It’s the perfect salad to make ahead as it gets better with time

media:content.media:title: Shaved Brussels Sprout Salad Recipe
media:content.media:description: This shaved brussels sprout salad is crisp and delicious. It’s topped with fresh pomegranate seeds, candied pecans, crunchy apples and salty Pecorino Romano. It’s the perfect salad to make ahead as it gets better with time

item.title: Make Banana Bread with Ripe Bananas
item.description: A simple banana bread recipe using ripe bananas for a sweet homemade bake.

media:content.media:title: Make Banana Bread with Ripe Bananas
media:content.media:description: A simple banana bread recipe using ripe bananas for a sweet homemade bake.

item.title: How To Make a Starbucks Dupe Lemon Loaf
item.description: This moist, one-bowl lemon loaf is a delicious Starbucks copycat recipe. It has a decadent and soft crumb, bright lemon flavor and topped with a thick drizzle of icing.

media:content.media:title: How To Make a Starbucks Dupe Lemon Loaf
media:content.media:description: This moist, one-bowl lemon loaf is a delicious Starbucks copycat recipe. It has a decadent and soft crumb, bright lemon flavor and topped with a thick drizzle of icing.

item.title: Delicious Egg Salad Sandwich Recipe
item.description: A simple and delicious egg salad sandwich recipe.

media:content.media:title: Delicious Egg Salad Sandwich Recipe
media:content.media:description: A simple and delicious egg salad sandwich recipe.

item.title: The Coziest of Coziness: Beef Stew
item.description: This braised Cozy Beef Stew is the perfect thing on a cold and crisp, chilly night. Add everything to a pot, stick it in the oven and forget it. Instant pot and slow cooker instructions included. Learn how to make this delicious meal

media:content.media:title: The Coziest of Coziness: Beef Stew
media:content.media:description: This braised Cozy Beef Stew is the perfect thing on a cold and crisp, chilly night. Add everything to a pot, stick it in the oven and forget it. Instant pot and slow cooker instructions included. Learn how to make this delicious meal

item.title: How to Make Ají de Gallina
item.description: Ají de Gallina is a the ultimate Peruvian comfort food. This chicken stew is spicy, creamy and so delicious when served over rice. Serve it with other Peruvian favorites like Papa a la Huancaina and a cold glass of Chicha Morada.

media:content.media:title: How to Make Ají de Gallina
media:content.media:description: Ají de Gallina is a the ultimate Peruvian comfort food. This chicken stew is spicy, creamy and so delicious when served over rice. Serve it with other Peruvian favorites like Papa a la Huancaina and a cold glass of Chicha Morada.

item.title: Tiramisu Affogato Sweet Treat
item.description:
Recipe: 2 tbls mascarpone cream 2 tbls heavy cream 1 tbls sugar Pinch of salt Ice cream of choice (I used Talenti's madagascar vanilla) Double or single shot of espresso Cocoa powder, as garnish
1. Beat together mascarpone, heavy cream until smooth and fluffy, about 30 seconds. 2. Pour in sugar and pinch of salt. Beat once more until combined. Add two scoops of ice cream to a glass. 3. Pour espresso on top. Add mascarpone whipped cream on top. Dust with cocoa powder. Serve with lady fingers.

media:content.media:title: Tiramisu Affogato Sweet Treat
media:content.media:description:
Recipe: 2 tbls mascarpone cream 2 tbls heavy cream 1 tbls sugar Pinch of salt Ice cream of choice (I used Talenti's madagascar vanilla) Double or single shot of espresso Cocoa powder, as garnish
1. Beat together mascarpone, heavy cream until smooth and fluffy, about 30 seconds. 2. Pour in sugar and pinch of salt. Beat once more until combined. Add two scoops of ice cream to a glass. 3. Pour espresso on top. Add mascarpone whipped cream on top. Dust with cocoa powder. Serve with lady fingers.

item.title: Fluffy Chocolate Cake Made Easy
item.description: Learn how to make a soft and fluffy chocolate cake step-by-step. This recipe shares simple baking tips for a rich texture, balanced sweetness, and a delicious homemade dessert.

media:content.media:title: Fluffy Chocolate Cake Made Easy
media:content.media:description: Learn how to make a soft and fluffy chocolate cake step-by-step. This recipe shares simple baking tips for a rich texture, balanced sweetness, and a delicious homemade dessert.

item.title: The Best Caesar Salad Recipe
item.description: The Best Caesar Salad recipe consists of a thick dressing made up of egg yolks, anchovy fillets, olive oil, parmesan and lemon juice. These ingredients create a delicious savory dressing that is delicious when tossed with garlic croutons and crisp romaine leaves.

media:content.media:title: The Best Caesar Salad Recipe
media:content.media:description: The Best Caesar Salad recipe consists of a thick dressing made up of egg yolks, anchovy fillets, olive oil, parmesan and lemon juice. These ingredients create a delicious savory dressing that is delicious when tossed with garlic croutons and crisp romaine leaves.
